items.name: BitRat's Army Cape
items.description:
The BitRat's Army Cape is an extraordinary galaxy-themed garment that transports wearers into the cosmos. Crafted from a shimmering, lightweight fabric, it features a mesmerizing design of swirling nebulae, twinkling stars, and distant galaxies, all rendered in vibrant shades of deep purple, electric blue, and glimmering silver.
